allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'POI总数: {d[\\"count\\"]}'\); areas={}; [areas.update\({p.get\('food_area','?'\): areas.get\(p.get\('food_area','?'\),0\)+1}\) for p in d['pois']]; [print\(f'  {k}: {v}个'\) for k,v in sorted\(areas.items\(\)\)]; print\(f'字段: {list\(d[\\"pois\\"][0].keys\(\)\)}'\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'landmarks数量: {len\(d.get\(\\"landmarks\\",[]\)\)}'\); [print\(f'  {l[\\"id\\"]}: {l[\\"name\\"]} \({l[\\"lng\\"]},{l[\\"lat\\"]}\)'\) for l in d.get\('landmarks',[]\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'shops数量: {d.get\(\\"count\\",0\)}'\); print\(f'字段: {list\(d[\\"shops\\"][0].keys\(\)\) if d.get\(\\"shops\\"\) else \\"无\\"}'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'tags数量: {len\(d.get\(\\"tags\\",[]\)\)}'\); [print\(f'  {t[\\"name\\"]}: {t[\\"count\\"]}'\) for t in d.get\('tags',[]\)]")
